name: mlb-alert-telegram-agent
description: Telegram bot for concise MLB pre-game alerts with win probability.

scripts.setup: npm run setup:python && npm run setup:web
scripts.test: npm run check && npm run test:js && npm run test:py
scripts.check: node --check src/index.js && node --check src/dashboard.js && node --check src/config.js && node --check src/telegram.js && node --check src/mlb.js && node --check src/storage.js && node --check src/lineMovement.js && node --check src/lineupMonitor.js && node --check src/platoonCapture.js && node --check src/llm.js && node --check src/analystSkill.js && node --check src/telegramFormat.js && node --check src/utils.js && node --check scripts/prepare_start.js && node --check scripts/process_runner.mjs && node --check scripts/start_all.mjs && node --check scripts/run_control_center.mjs && node --check scripts/run_api.mjs && node --check scripts/migrate_state_to_sqlite.js && node --check scripts/doctor.mjs
